content:
# Acetic Acid Leaching

**Summary**: A chemical extraction method used to dissolve limestone matrix and release microfossils.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-jalloh|Jalloh, 2024]] applied acetic acid leaching to extract foraminifera from 57 well-lithified samples.

## Key Results and Findings

- Yielded a higher abundance and diversity of foraminiferal assemblages compared to traditional thin-section techniques. ([[2024-jalloh|Jalloh, 2024, p. 55]])
